title: Word Search
input_format: An `m x n` grid of characters `board` and a string `word`.
output_format: A boolean indicating if the word exists in the grid.
constraints:
- `m == board.length`
- `n == board[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 6`
- `1 <= word.length <= 15`
- `board` and `word` consists of only lowercase and uppercase English letters.
function_signature: function exist(board: string[][], word: string): boolean {}
